caption: A man in a grey suit jacket, a red button-down shirt, and a patterned grey tie stands before a blue studio background. He is speaking, and his facial expressions and lip movements shift slightly across the sequence of frames. To his right, a small inset image displays two people, a woman and a man, sitting at a table looking at documents. Below this inset image, the white text "OFF-GRID Solar Training" is visible. The man remains stationary in a medium shot, with his hands held low and out of view, as the camera maintains a fixed position. The lighting is consistent throughout the scene, and no other objects or movements are present in the background.
